mnemonics: D-E-C-P: Data Profiling, ETL Monitoring, Cleansing, Parsing/Standardization - the core DQ tool functions.
keyPoints: Data Profiling tools analyze data to assess its quality and discover anomalies.
Data Cleansing tools correct errors, remove duplicates, and standardize formats.
ETL and Data Quality tools are often integrated to monitor and enforce quality during the data loading process.
commonMistakes: Focusing only on technical data quality (e.g., syntax) while ignoring business context and semantic quality (e.g., meaning).
Treating data quality as a one-time project instead of an ongoing process requiring continuous monitoring and improvement.
